mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id AS conversationId, user_id AS userId, unread_count AS unreadCount, last_read_seq AS lastReadSeq, is_top AS isTop, is_mute AS isMute, is_archived AS isArchived, manual_unread AS manualUnread, deleted, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM im_conversation_user WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, conversation_id AS conversationId, user_id AS userId, unread_count AS unreadCount, last_read_seq AS lastReadSeq, is_top AS isTop, is_mute AS isMute, is_archived AS isArchived, manual_unread AS manualUnread, deleted, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM im_conversation_user WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}

SELECT DISTINCT cu2.user_id FROM im_conversation_user cu1 INNER JOIN im_conversation_user cu2 ON cu1.conversation_id = cu2.conversation_id AND cu2.user_id != #{userId} AND cu2.deleted = 0 WHERE cu1.user_id = #{userId} AND cu1.deleted = 0
